Tools  › 

on demand

Parameters

NameTypeRequiredDescription
type_key string no Schedule-type key, e.g. 'extract_fan_schedule'
project_ref string no Project reference, e.g. 'G0053'
project_name string no Optional friendly project name for the workbook header
schedule_number string no Optional schedule identifier, e.g. 'MS-01'
item_count integer no Number of empty item columns (default 6, max 40)
save_to_path string no Absolute path to save the .xlsx. Default: %TEMP%/Adelphos/Schedules/{filename}

Example prompts

Keywords

create schedule · new schedule · blank schedule · mep schedule · extract fan schedule · pump schedule · ashp schedule · schedule workbook · schedule xlsx · adelphos

Auto-generated by from data SHA . See Tool Page Skill for the contract.
